truthAudit.Summary: The audited Run 2 successfully identified three significant security weaknesses within the analyzed source code (SC-V3-004: Command Injection x 2 paths and a relevant stack buffer overflow at stack boundaries). Although each finding is correctly rooted in the vulnerable code, Run 2 inaccurately assessed the impact severity of the Command Injection vulnerabilities from Comprehensive/Truth Standard (SC-V3-004), classifying them as 'High' complexity when the defined truth level is 'Critical'. No critical vulnerabilities were initially discovered and missed.
